case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. YUILET AIRADO CARDOSO

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOPHIA REYES LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT YUILET AIRADO CARDOSO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $572.13 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CARDOSO, YUILET AIRADO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-31-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY OPORTUN INC.
